Communications and media

The Chelmsford Diocese Communications Team

This page contains information and resources to support parishes in their use of communications and media. The page also includes contact details for our Communications and Media Team. 

Please select from the links below

Communications guidance and advice for churches

Communications advice and guidance to help parishes communicate effectively.

Communications training and support

Communications training opportunities and resources for parishes.

Communications & Media Team

Contact the Diocese of Chelmsford Communications and Media Team.

Share your news

If you have a good news story, we’d love to hear from you. Find out how you can share your news with us.

Latest News

Catch up and read all the latest news from across our Dicoese.

Our Publications

We produce a range of publications that include a weekly roundup of what's happening across the Diocese to daily prayer diary.

Media Gallery

Click here to view our Media Gallery

Diocese of Chelmsford logo

Download the Chelmsford Diocese logo in a variety of formats.

Information and resources to support parishes and worshipping communities.

phone 01245 294 400
